The suggestion adds clarity about the response contents (account details, plan info, usage stats, API availability), explains the operation's purpose in the context of API setup verification, and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation (e.g., before other operations or for health checks).

data.current_description: Verify API setup and get account information
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current API status and authenticated account information. Returns account details including plan information, usage statistics, and API availability status. Use this operation to verify API connectivity and confirm account setup before performing other operations.
data.reasoning: The current description is too vague and doesn't clearly explain what information is returned or the operation's practical use case. The suggestion adds clarity about the response contents (account details, plan info, usage stats, API availability), explains the operation's purpose in the context of API setup verification, and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation (e.g., before other operations or for health checks).

message: Operation 'validateDomain' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about what information is returned and the practical use case. Enhanced description clarifies the return value structure and explains the domain context (identifying temporary email services), which helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to use it.

data.current_description: Validate domain information and check if it's disposable
data.description_suggestion: Validate a domain to determine if it's disposable and retrieve detailed domain information. Returns validation results including disposability status, domain characteristics, and associated metadata. Useful for identifying temporary email service domains.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about what information is returned and the practical use case. Enhanced description clarifies the return value structure and explains the domain context (identifying temporary email services), which helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to use it.

data.current_description: Get paginated list of blocklisted domains (Pro account required)
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all domains currently on your blocklist. Requires Pro account authentication. Returns paginated results with domain entries and pagination metadata. Use this to audit your blocklist or export blocked domains.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear, but description lacks details about pagination parameters, response structure, and practical use cases. Enhanced description specifies authentication requirement, pagination details, and use cases to help AI agents understand how to use pagination and what to expect in the response.

message: Operation 'addToBlocklist' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate, but description is incomplete. Missing details about required input (domain parameter), response confirmation, and side effects (future email validations will be affected). Enhanced description clarifies the request format, authentication, return value, and the operational impact of adding a domain to the blocklist.

data.current_description: Add a single domain to the blocklist (Pro account required)
data.description_suggestion: Add a single domain to your blocklist to block all email addresses from that domain. Requires Pro account authentication and a valid domain in the request body. Returns confirmation of the added domain. Subsequent email validations will flag addresses from this domain as blocklisted.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description is incomplete. Missing details about required input (domain parameter), response confirmation, and side effects (future email validations will be affected). Enhanced description clarifies the request format, authentication, return value, and the operational impact of adding a domain to the blocklist.

message: Operation 'bulkAddToBlocklist' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear, but description lacks input format details, response structure, and side effects. Enhanced description specifies the request format (array of domains), response content (success/failure summary), and operational impact (immediate application to validations), enabling AI agents to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

data.current_description: Add multiple domains to blocklist (max 1,000 entries, Pro account required)
data.description_suggestion: Add up to 1,000 domains to your blocklist in a single request. Requires Pro account authentication and an array of domains in the request body. Returns a summary of successfully added domains and any failures. All added domains will be immediately applied to future email validations.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear, but description lacks input format details, response structure, and side effects. Enhanced description specifies the request format (array of domains), response content (success/failure summary), and operational impact (immediate application to validations), enabling AI agents to properly construct requests and interpret responses.

Summary is clear, but description lacks details about response confirmation and side effects. Enhanced description clarifies the parameter format, return value, and operational impact (future email validations will change behavior), helping AI agents understand the full scope of this operation.

data.current_description: Remove a domain from the blocklist (Pro account required)
data.description_suggestion: Remove a domain from your blocklist to allow email addresses from that domain again. Requires Pro account authentication and the domain name as a path parameter. Returns confirmation of removal. Subsequent email validations will no longer flag addresses from this domain as blocklisted.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear, but description lacks details about response confirmation and side effects. Enhanced description clarifies the parameter format, return value, and operational impact (future email validations will change behavior), helping AI agents understand the full scope of this operation.
